creator: sven.a.jonsson@bahnhof.se
text:
Ok, I found the documentation. The reason I never searched for it was because it just worked without this setting when I used 13.0 and 13.1, so the ccache in poudriere just stopped working after the upgrade from my point of view.
I guess a mention of this setting in poudriere.conf would have pointed my in the right direction.
Anyway, I am closing this issue as it is obviously not a bug.
